name: GET /api/leads/:id/timeline - Append-only event timeline for a lead
description: Operator-facing read endpoint behind the admin-cockpit Lead Detail screen's Activity tab. Returns every lead_timeline_events row in reverse-chronological order — system events (lead.created, lead.stage_changed, lead.assigned) interleaved with operator notes (lead.note). 404 when the lead row is gone (timeline cascades on delete).

testCases.name: Read timeline for a freshly captured lead
